fields.description: Specialising in data-driven decision making, enterprise information systems, and digital transformation.
Foundation in business processes, IT infrastructure, and information management principles.

fields.name: Data Science
fields.description: Turning raw data into actionable insights.

fields.name: Open Source
fields.description: Contributing to and using open-source tools.

fields.title: Information Flow Dashboard
fields.description:
A comprehensive dashboard built with Python and Power BI to visualise information flows within a mid-sized organisation. The project involved stakeholder interviews, data mapping, ETL pipeline construction, and interactive reporting.

Key outcomes included a 30% reduction in report generation time and improved cross-departmental data transparency. The solution integrates with existing ERP systems via REST APIs.
fields.short_description: Power BI + Python dashboard visualising organisational information flows and KPIs in real time.
fields.technologies: Python, Power BI, SQL, REST API, pandas

fields.title: Research Data Pipeline
fields.description:
An automated ETL pipeline for processing and cleaning large academic datasets. Built as part of a research project on information quality, the pipeline handles ingestion from multiple sources, validation, deduplication, and storage in a structured SQLite database.

The pipeline processes 500k+ records and reduces manual data cleaning effort by ~80%.
fields.short_description: Automated ETL pipeline for cleaning and processing large academic research datasets.

fields.title: Personal Portfolio Website
fields.description:
This very website — a Django-based portfolio site with a dark-themed UI. Features include a project showcase, skills tracker, contact form with database storage, and a full admin interface for content management.

Built to practice full-stack Django development and serve as a living portfolio.
fields.short_description: Django portfolio site with project showcase, skills tracker, and contact form.
fields.technologies: Django, Python, SQLite, HTML, CSS, JavaScript

fields.title: NLP Text Classifier
fields.description:
A text classification model trained on Dutch-language documents to categorise support tickets automatically. Uses scikit-learn with TF-IDF vectorisation and a logistic regression classifier.

Achieves ~87% accuracy on the test set and cuts manual triaging time significantly.
fields.short_description: Dutch-language NLP classifier for automatic support ticket categorisation.
